name: Peanut Butter Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Beat the butter and sugar together until fluffy. Add the egg and vanilla, mixing well.
2. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt; mix until just combined. Fold in the oats and chocolate chips.
3. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 8-9 minutes for a chewy cookie, or 10-11 minutes for a crisp cookie.
5. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely. Store in a tightly covered container. Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
